title: Parkio Daily Briefing for April 27, 2026
teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise launches ahead of June 19 theatrical release. Parks operating normally with standard weekend crowds.

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Collection Launches
bignews.body: Disney unveiled a wide range of Toy Story 5-themed products ahead of the film's June 19 theatrical release. New merchandise includes interactive talking figures from Mattel, LEGO playsets, collectibles from Funko and POP MART, Crocs Jessie boots launching June 16, and travel accessories from Away available June 9. The collection features classic characters plus newcomers Lilypad and Smarty Pants.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story Figures Talk to Each Other
topstories.body: Mattel's new Toy Story 5 Playscale Interactables bring innovative play features to the franchise. Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky figures each come with iconic phrases and can recognize and interact with each other when placed together.

topstories.title: LeapFrog Launches Educational Lilypad Toy
topstories.body: The new Explore & Learn Lilypad from LeapFrog lets kids explore letters, numbers, and problem-solving skills through games. Children can also send text messages to Toy Story characters using emojis and preset messages, blending the film's toy-meet-tech theme with educational play.

topstories.title: Away Launches Toy Story Travel Collection
topstories.body: Travel brand Away will release a Toy Story 5 collection on June 9 featuring rolling luggage, backpacks, and bag charms for kids and adults. Designs are inspired by Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Aliens, and newcomer Lilypad, available online and in select retail locations.

icymi.title: Pandora Jewelry Adds Toy Story Sheriff Star Bracelet
icymi.body: Pandora's Toy Story collection, launching May 21, includes a Sheriff Star Bracelet featuring blue and brown leather with an embossed sheriff star charm inspired by Woody. The collection will be available on us.pandora.net and in select retail locations.

icymi.title: Crocs Unveils Jessie-Inspired Western Boots
icymi.body: Crocs will release Toy Story 5 Jessie boots on June 16 featuring denim and cow print collars, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms. The Western-inspired design brings the character's iconic look to Crocs' signature footwear style.

spotlight.title: Planning Your Next Disney Visit
spotlight.body: All Disney parks are operating on regular schedules this weekend. Spring weather continues to bring comfortable conditions for park-goers. Consider arriving early to maximize your time on popular attractions before midday crowds build.
